org.vorpal.blade.services.keepalive
Class KeepAliveServlet

java.lang.Object
  javax.servlet.GenericServlet
      javax.servlet.sip.SipServlet
          org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
              org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
                  org.vorpal.blade.services.keepalive.KeepAliveServlet
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable, java.util.EventListener, javax.servlet.Servlet, javax.servlet.ServletConfig, javax.servlet.ServletContextListener, javax.servlet.sip.SipApplicationSessionListener, javax.servlet.sip.SipServletListener, javax.servlet.sip.TimerListener, org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaListener
@WebListener
public class KeepAliveServlet
extends org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
implements javax.servlet.sip.SipApplicationSessionListener
